snippet.title: Ursula Von der Leyen snubbed in chair gaffe at EU-ErdoƒЯan talks
snippet.description:
The president of the European commission, Ursula von der Leyen, was momentarily left without a seat as she met with the European council president, Charles Michel and Turkish president, Recep Tayyip ErdoƒЯan, in Ankara on Tuesday - triggering an avalanche of criticism.

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube вЦЇ http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

With only two chairs available, Von der Leyen, the sole attending female leader, sat on the sofa as ErdoƒЯan and Michel sat on the chairs. вАЬEhm,вАЭ she muttered, with a small gesticulation directed at the occupied seats. Michel, who had appeared to make a bee-line for the top spot next to ErdoƒЯan as the party entered, offered little evidence of regret.

A spokesperson for Von der Leyen said: "The important thing is that the president should have been seated in exactly the same manner as the President of the European Council and the Turkish President. But ... she decided to proceed nevertheless prioritising substance over protocol."

The awkward scene was played out ahead of a three-hour meeting with ErdoƒЯan where one of the issues raised by the EU leaders was womenвАЩs rights in light of TurkeyвАЩs withdrawal from a convention on gender-based violence.

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today вЦЇ https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/theguardian
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/guardian

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Welcome to the Jam! LeBron James, NBA champion and global icon, goes on an epic adventure alongside Bugs Bunny and his looney friends.
 
When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвАЩve never seen them before. ItвАЩs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвАЩs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself.
 
Available in theaters and to stream on HBO Max on July 16, in the US only, for 31 days from theatrical release, at no extra cost to subscribers.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook

snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviƒЗ iz Golubinje kod ≈љepƒНa poznat je po tome ≈°to je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistiƒНku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviƒЗ from Golubinja near ≈љepƒНe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

snippet.title: Isprobavamo TURSKU hranu!
snippet.description:
Danas gledate vlog koji smo snimali u Turskoj, ali kako Relja nije bio sa nama - doneli smo neke grickalice da cujemo i njegove utiske! :)


Ako ste propustili travel vlogove iz Turske:
TURSKA travel vlog: Assos, Apolonov grad i nekoliko konja :)  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xTSM5Dva81g
TURSKA travel vlog: TROJA i Istanbul! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8m1WnGNekWY



*Ukoliko ispod ovog videa nisu omoguceni komentari nisam ih ja ugasila. Jutjub se bori sa zlostavljanjem dece na ovoj platiformi, pa zato gase komentare na kanalima na kojima se pojavljuju deca. Nadam se da ce uskoro pronaci najbolji nacin da komentari opet budu omoguceni, a nasa deca sigurna. Hvala vam na razumevanju!

Ana2catsbeauty.rs https://ana2catsbeauty.rs/

snippet.title: Ne≈°to novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ƒНas! Easter eggs.
snippet.description:
Farbanje uskr≈°njih jaja na ovaj naƒНin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, ne≈Њne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove ne≈Њnije su mi dra≈Њe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskr≈°nja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPA≈љ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite pra≈°kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punƒНa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaƒЗi jo≈° koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliƒНno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunƒСerom skinite peƒНat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ≈°erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola ka≈°iƒНice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji ≈Њelite. Ni≈°ta ne me≈°ajte, sok ƒЗe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za ne≈Њniju boju, rozu jaja dr≈Њite kraƒЗe u soku.

Istresite teƒНnost i jaja stavite na radnu povr≈°inu da se osu≈°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih prema≈Њite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

≈†to se tiƒНe ≈Њutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorand≈Њe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirƒЗetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok mo≈Њe bilo koji drugi.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji ≈Њelite. Ni≈°ta ne me≈°ajte, sok ƒЗe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za ne≈Њniju boju, rozu jaja dr≈Њite kraƒЗe u soku.

Istresite teƒНnost i jaja stavite na radnu povr≈°inu da se osu≈°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih prema≈Њite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

≈†to se tiƒНe ≈Њutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorand≈Њe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirƒЗetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok mo≈Њe bilo koji drugi.

snippet.title: ≈†ta jo≈° mogu da nam urade | Novi Sputnjik poredak
snippet.description:

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Emanet 155. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | Legacy Episode 155 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet

snippet.title: Emanet 154. B√ґl√Љm | Legacy Episode 154
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Ger√Іekler

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowвАЛ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвАЩs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

WeвАЩve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвАЩs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвАЩll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвАЩs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвАЩll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.title: Kurulu≈Я Osman 52. B√ґl√Љm
snippet.description:
Kurulu≈Я Osman 52.B√ґl√Љm √Цzeti:

KAYI OBASI ≈ЮEHƒ∞TLERƒ∞NE AƒЮLIYOR
Osman Bey, Umur BeyвАЩin ƒ∞neg√ґl KalesiвАЩne teslim edeceƒЯi atlara el koyarken; TogayвАЩƒ±n saldƒ±rƒ±sƒ±nƒ± p√Љsk√Љrten Kayƒ±lar, ba≈Яta Abdurrahman Gazi olmak √Љzere ≈Яehitlerin acƒ±sƒ±yla sarsƒ±lƒ±r. Umur Bey, ƒ∞neg√ґl KalesiвАЩne sƒ±zmak i√Іin Nikola ile ticarete devam kararƒ± alƒ±r ancak bu planƒ±nƒ± Osman BeyвАЩle payla≈Яmadƒ±ƒЯƒ± i√Іin ikili arasƒ±ndaki gerilim devam eder.  

OSMAN BEY, Bƒ∞ZANS KUVVETLERƒ∞NE BASKIN YAPIYOR
D√Љndar Bey, Osman BeyвАЩi bertaraf etmek i√Іin TogayвАЩƒ± kullanmayƒ± planlar. Savcƒ± Bey, destek birliklerinin ƒ∞neg√ґlвАЩe yakla≈Яtƒ±ƒЯƒ± bilgisini getirince Osman Bey alplerini toplayarak harekete ge√Іer. 

UMUR BEY KANITI TESLƒ∞M EDƒ∞YOR
≈Юey Edebalƒ±, Osman Bey ve Umur Bey arasƒ±ndaki gerilime son vermek i√Іin ikisini de birbirinden habersiz dergahƒ±na davet eder. Umur Bey burada Malhun HatunвАЩun ele ge√ІirdiƒЯi zihgiri Osman BeyвАЩe teslim edince, obadaki hainin D√Љndar Bey olduƒЯu ortaya √Іƒ±kar.

Umur Bey, Osman Bey bulu≈Яmasƒ±nda neler ya≈Яanacak?

O, k√ґm√Љr karasƒ± g√ґzleriyle, gaza ve h√Љrriyet ate≈Яini tutu≈Яturacaktƒ±.

Kan ve g√ґzya≈Яƒ±yla sulanan topraklarda, g√ґk ekini gibi bi√Іilen; yedi g√ґƒЯ√Љ, yedi yeri, daƒЯlarƒ±, denizleri a≈Яacak bir milletin r√Љyasƒ±nƒ± вАЬa≈ЯklaвАЭ g√ґrd√Љ.

ar.title: ЎІўДўЕЎ§Ў≥Ў≥ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠ўДўВЎ© 52
ar.description:
ўЕўДЎЃЎµ ЎІўДЎ≠ўДўВЎ© 52
ўЕЎєЎ≥ўГЎ± ўГЎІўКўК ўКЎ®ўГЎ± ЎєўДўЙ ЎіўЗЎѓЎІЎ¶ўЗ 
ўБўК ЎІўДўИўВЎ™ ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўИўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎЃўКўИўД ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў≥ўКЎ≥ўДўЕЎЃЎІ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєўЕЎ± ўДўВўДЎєЎ© Ў•ўЖўКЎђўИўД , ўКЎ®ўГўК ўЕЎєЎ≥ўГЎ± ўГЎІўКўК ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКЎµЎѓ ўЗЎђўИўЕ Ў™ўИЎЇЎІўК ўИЎєўДўЙ Ў±Ў£Ў≥ўЗўЕ ЎєЎ®ЎѓЎІўДЎ±Ў≠ўЕўЖ ЎЇЎІЎ≤ўК ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎіўЗЎѓЎІЎ° ЎІўДЎ™ўК ўБўВЎѓўИўЗўЕ. ўКЎ™ЎЃЎ∞ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєўЕЎ± ўВЎ±ЎІЎ± ўЕЎ™ЎІЎ®ЎєЎ© ЎІўДЎ™ЎђЎІЎ±Ў© ўЕЎє ўЖўКўГўИўДЎІ ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ЎІўДЎ™Ў≥ўДўД ўДўВўДЎєЎ© Ў•ўЖўКЎЇўИўД Ў•ўДЎІ Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎ™ўИЎ™Ў± ўКЎ≥ўИЎѓ Ў®ўКўЖ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєўЕЎ± ўИЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ўДЎ£ўЖўЗ ўДўЕ ўКЎіЎІЎ±ўГ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ўЗЎ∞ўЗ ЎІўДЎЃЎЈЎ©.

ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ўКўЗЎІЎђўЕ ЎІўДўВўИЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ®ўКЎ≤ўЖЎЈўКЎ©
ўКЎ≥Ў™ЎЇўД ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎѓўЖўИўЖЎѓЎІЎ± Ў™ўИЎЇЎІўК ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ЎІўДўВЎґЎІЎ° ЎєўДўЙ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ. ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ ўКЎђўДЎ® ЎІўДўЕЎѓЎєўК ЎІўДЎєЎІўЕ ЎІўДўЕЎєўДўИўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ™ўК Ў™ўБўКЎѓ Ў®Ў£ўЖ ўИЎ≠ЎѓЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎѓЎєўЕ Ў™ўВЎ™Ў±Ў® ўЕўЖ Ў•ўКўЖЎЇўИўДЎМ ўКЎ™ЎЃЎ∞ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєўЕЎЂЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ•ЎђЎ±ЎІЎ°ЎІЎ™ ўЕўЖ ЎЃўДЎІўД ЎђўЕЎє ўВЎ®ЎІЎ¶ўД ЎІўДЎ£ўДЎ®.

ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєўЕЎ± ўКЎ≥ўДўЕ ЎѓўДўКўДўЗ
ўКЎѓЎєўИ ЎІўДЎіўКЎЃ Ў£ЎѓўКЎ®ЎІўДўК ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ўИЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєўЕЎ± ЎѓўИўЖ Ў£ўЖ ўКўГўИўЖ ўДЎѓўКўЗўЕЎІ ЎєўДўЕ Ў•ўДўКўЗ ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД Ў•ўЖўЗЎІЎ° ЎІўДЎ™ўИЎ™Ў± Ў®ўКўЖўЗўЕЎІ. ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ ўКЎ≥ўДўЕ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєўЕЎ± ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎ™ўЕ ЎІўДЎ™ўК ЎІЎ≥Ў™ўИўДЎ™ ЎєўДўКўЗ ЎІўДЎ≥ўДЎЈЎІўЖЎ© ўЕЎІўДўЗўИўЖ Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ЎѓўК ЎєўЕЎЂЎІўЖ ўКЎ™Ў®ўКўЖ Ў£ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎѓўИўЖЎѓЎІЎ± ўЗўИ ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎ¶ўЖ

ўГўКўБ Ў≥ўКўЖЎ™ўВўЕ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ Ў™ўИЎЇЎІўКЎЯ
ўЕЎІЎ∞ЎІ Ў≥ўКўБЎєўД ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ЎєўЖЎѓўЕЎІ ўКЎєўДўЕ Ў®ЎЃўКЎІўЖЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎѓўИўЖЎѓЎІЎ±, ўГўКўБ Ў≥ўКўЖЎ™ўВўЕ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ ўЕўЖ Ў™ўИЎЇЎІўК ЎІўДЎ∞ЎІ ЎѓЎІўЗўЕ ўЕЎђўДЎ≥ ЎІўДЎ≤ўБЎІўБЎЯ ўГўКўБ Ў≥ўКўГўИўЖ Ў±Ўѓ ўБЎєўД ЎІўДЎ≥ўДЎЈЎІўЖЎ© ўЕЎІўДўЗўИўЖ ЎєўДўЙ ўВўКЎІўЕ ЎІўДЎ≥ўКЎѓ ЎєЎЂўЕЎІўЖ Ў®Ў≠ЎЄЎ± ЎІўДЎ™ЎђЎІЎ±Ў© ўЕЎє Ў®ўКЎ≤ўЖЎЈЎ©ЎЯ ўЕЎІўЗўК ЎєЎІўВЎ®Ў© ЎІўДЎ≥ўДЎЈЎІўЖЎ© ЎЇўИўЖЎђЎІ ЎІўДўЕЎµЎІЎ®Ў©ЎЯ ўЕЎІўЗўК Ў±ЎѓЎ© ўБЎєўД ЎІўДЎ≥Ў≥ўКЎѓ Ў®ЎІўЕЎ≥ўК ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўБўВЎЈ ЎµЎѓўКўВ Ў±ўИЎ≠ўЗ ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎ±Ў≠ўЕўЖ ЎЇЎІЎ≤ўКЎЯ
